description: Inject current workspace context at session start and before each user turn

hooks.command:
if command -v taskferry >/dev/null 2>&1; then if context="$(taskferry context --format codex-hook)"; then printf '%s
' "$context"; else printf '%s
' '{"additionalContext":"taskferry context failed. Run taskferry doctor to diagnose."}'; fi; else printf '%s
' '{"additionalContext":"taskferry is unavailable. Install taskferry and ensure it is on PATH, then restart Codex."}'; fi

if command -v taskferry >/dev/null 2>&1; then if context="$(taskferry context --format codex-hook)"; then printf '%s
' "$context"; else printf '%s
' '{"additionalContext":"taskferry context failed. Run taskferry doctor to diagnose."}'; fi; else printf '%s
' '{"additionalContext":"taskferry is unavailable. Install taskferry and ensure it is on PATH, then restart Codex."}'; fi
